title: micromeria teneriffae
intro: Micromeria teneriffae, also known as Canary Island savory, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Canary Islands. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its volatile oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Micromeria teneriffae include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Micromeria teneriffae can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or internally for various health benefits.
